name: True King Agnimazud, the Vanisher
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>真</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アグニマズド<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｖ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>バニッシャー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Agnimazud Vanisher, the True Dragon King
desc: If this card is in your hand: You can destroy 2 other monsters in your hand and/or face-up field, including a FIRE monster, and if you do, Special Summon this card, and if you do that, you can banish 1 monster from your opponent's field or GY, if both the destroyed monsters were FIRE. If this card is destroyed by card effect: You can add 1 non-FIRE Wyrm monster from your GY to your hand. You can only use each effect of "True King Agnimazud, the Vanisher" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand: You can destroy 2 other monsters in your hand and/or face-up field, including a FIRE monster, and if you do, Special Summon this card, and if you do that, you can banish 1 monster from your opponent's field or GY, if both the destroyed monsters were FIRE. If this card is destroyed by card effect: You can add 1 non-FIRE Wyrm monster from your GY to your hand. You can only use each effect of "True King Agnimazud, the Vanisher" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand: You can destroy 2 other monsters in your hand and/or face-up field, including a FIRE monster, and if you do, Special Summon this card, and if you do that, you can banish 1 monster from your opponent's field or GY, if both the destroyed monsters were FIRE. If this card is destroyed by card effect: You can add 1 non-FIRE Wyrm monster from your GY to your hand. You can only use each effect of "True King Agnimazud, the Vanisher" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck R: Onslaught of the Fire Kings

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
